modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error accessing SNAP due to Banner maintenance message.

full_description_text: The user was trying to log into SNAP but got an error message. It said something about Banner Special Maintenance, which is confusing. They were also using other systems like Banner Finance and Leave Request, but couldn't get into SNAP at all.
short_description: Error accessing SNAP due to Banner maintenance message.
description: The user was trying to log into SNAP but got an error message. It said something about Banner Special Maintenance, which is confusing. They were also using other systems like Banner Finance and Leave Request, but couldn't get into SNAP at all.
